questions.title: Primary Care - Advanced Practitioner
questions.question_text: A patient attends asthma review with peak flow below target. What is your NEXT step?
options: A) Immediately increase inhaled steroid dose
B) Assess technique, adherence, triggers, consider step up if indicated per BTS guidelines
D) Tell patient to see GP
questions.correct_answer: B) Assess technique, adherence, triggers, consider step up if indicated per BTS guidelines
questions.explanation: Follow systematic assessment before escalating treatment

questions.title: Primary Care Scenario - Advanced Practitioner
questions.question_text: Running 30 minutes behind in clinic with 5 patients still waiting. How do you manage?
questions.expected_response: Apologize to waiting patients, give realistic wait time, offer rebooking, ensure each patient gets quality time not rushed care, identify why running late, discuss with manager if systemic issue
